Subject: Request for Extension on Project Submission

Dear Professor Henderson,

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension for my upcoming project, which is currently due in two days. I understand that the assigned deadline remains firm for most students, but my situation requires some flexibility to ensure high-quality work. I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this request may cause to your grading schedule.

The primary reason for needing more time is an unexpected family emergency that has disrupted my study routine significantly. Specifically, my father was hospitalized last night, requiring my immediate attention and care, which has left me with very little time to research and draft the necessary sections of the assignment. This personal crisis has made it impossible for me to meet the original deadline without compromising the integrity of my research.

Additionally, I have encountered some difficulties accessing the required academic databases, which has further delayed my progress. I am confident that with an additional two days, I can complete the project thoroughly and submit it with the care it deserves. I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to resubmit my work by next Friday.

Thank you for your time and understanding regarding this matter.

Sincerely,

Alex Johnson
